name: NX Fix Manifest
description: Provides multi-source stream aggregation with support for RealDebrid, TorBox, and multiple torrent/debrid scrapers. Features include Zilean, Meteor, Comet, Knaben, StremThru Torz, Torrent Galaxy, EZTV, OpenSubtitles integration, and advanced sorting/formatting options. Supports movies, series, anime with quality preference (BluRay REMUX to CAM) and resolution filters (1080p to 144p). Cached stream prioritization and customizable visual formatting.
